mapper.select: select orderid, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3, db, owner, table_name, constraint_type, object_type, object_owner, object_name, status, result, ddl from cotdl.tbl_orderddl order by `orderid` , `stepid` , `seq1` , `seq2` , `seq3` , `object_type` desc
select orderid, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3, db, owner, table_name, constraint_type, object_type, object_owner, object_name, status, result, ddl from cotdl.tbl_orderddl

select orderid, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3, db, owner, table_name, constraint_type, object_type, object_owner, object_name, status, result, ddl from cotdl.tbl_orderddl
order by `orderid` , `stepid` , `seq1` , `seq2` , `seq3` , `object_type` desc

select orderid, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3, db, owner, table_name, constraint_type, object_type, object_owner, object_name, status, result, ddl from cotdl.tbl_orderddl
order by `orderid` , `stepid` , `seq1` , `seq2` , `seq3` , `object_type`
